name: Echo Memory Cloud OpenClaw Plugin
description: Sync OpenClaw local markdown memory files to Echo cloud

baseUrl.description: Deprecated and ignored. The plugin now uses a fixed internal EchoMem backend endpoint.

webBaseUrl.description: Deprecated and ignored. The plugin now uses a fixed internal Echo web endpoint.

apiKey.description: Your API Key for Echo Memory Cloud (e.g. from .env ECHOMEM_API_KEY)

memoryDir.description: Absolute path to the markdown memory directory. Falls back to ECHOMEM_MEMORY_DIR, then ~/.openclaw/workspace/memory.

localOnlyMode.description: When true, disables cloud sync and API key requirement. Local UI and markdown browsing still work.

disableOpenClawMemoryToolsWhenConnected.description: When true, blocks OpenClaw's default memory_search and memory_get tools after Echo cloud access is verified, so memory retrieval relies on EchoMemory instead.

localUiAutoOpenOnGatewayStart.description: Automatically open the local workspace viewer in the default browser when the gateway starts.

localUiAutoInstall.description: Automatically run npm install and build for the local UI when assets are missing.
